commands.review_summary:
Adds the missing findings-table link and remediation section for the `sdk-load-session-store` plugin validation code.

Reproducibility: not applicable. This PR repairs a missing documentation anchor rather than a runtime defect. The gap is directly verifiable because current `main` lacks both the findings-table entry and matching heading.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Routine maintainer review can land this correct docs-only patch; there is no concrete defect for an automated repair lane.

target.title: docs: add session store validation remediation
target.body:
## Summary

- Add the missing `sdk-load-session-store` remediation anchor to the plugin validation fixes docs.
- Include the code in the author-facing findings table so Plugin Inspector remediation links resolve to a real section.
- Verified the generated OpenClaw docs publish tree keeps the page under the ClawHub tab.

## Proof

- `bun run docs:list`
- `bun run format:check -- docs/plugin-validation-fixes.md`
- `bun run ci:static`
- `node /Users/patrickerichsen/Git/openclaw/openclaw/scripts/docs-sync-publish.mjs --target <tmp> --source-repo openclaw/openclaw --source-sha <openclaw-sha> --clawhub-repo /Users/patrickerichsen/.codex/worktrees/631a/clawhub --clawhub-source-repo openclaw/clawhub --clawhub-source-sha <clawhub-sha>` plus `rg` confirmation for `sdk-load-session-store` and `clawhub/plugin-validation-fixes`.
target.author: patrick-erichsen

commands.reason: PR is not opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
